records.question: Which departments that have member_of records, course records, and minor_in records have the division exactly equal to 'EN', the department name exactly equal to 'Mathematical Sciences', and offer a course exactly named 'DISCRETE MATHEMATICS' with hours equal to 11?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dno FROM department
JOIN member_of ON department.dno = member_of.dno
JOIN course ON department.dno = course.dno
JOIN minor_in ON department.dno = minor_in.dno
WHERE course.hours = '11' AND department.dname = 'Mathematical Sciences' AND course.cname = 'DISCRETE MATHEMATICS' AND department.division = 'EN'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT d.DNO
FROM Department d
WHERE d.Division = 'EN'
  AND d.DName = 'Mathematical Sciences'
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Member_of m WHERE m.DNO = d.DNO)
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Course c WHERE c.DNO = d.DNO AND c.CName = 'DISCRETE MATHEMATICS' AND c.Hours = '11')
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Minor_in mi WHERE mi.DNO = d.DNO)

  AND d.DPhone <= 7033
  AND m.Appt_Type = 'Primary'

records.question: What departments named Mathematical Sciences are in the EN division and Maryland building, have a phone number of at least 7195, and offer courses on MTW taught by faculty named Shih-Ping?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dno FROM department
JOIN course ON department.dno = course.dno
JOIN faculty ON course.instructor = faculty.facid
WHERE department.dname = 'Mathematical Sciences' AND faculty.fname = 'Shih-Ping' AND department.division = 'EN' AND department.building = 'Maryland' AND department.dphone >= 7195 AND course.days = 'MTW'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT d.DNO
FROM Department d
JOIN Course c ON d.DNO = c.DNO
JOIN Faculty f ON c.Instructor = f.FacID
WHERE d.DName = 'Mathematical Sciences'
  AND d.Division = 'EN'
  AND d.Building = 'Maryland'
  AND d.DPhone >= 7195
  AND c.Days = 'MTW'
  AND f.Fname = 'Shih-Ping'

records.question: Which departments have the name 'ECE' and division 'EN' and also have courses held on 'W' days and have minor_in records?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dno FROM department

JOIN minor_in ON department.dno = minor_in.dno

    WHERE c.Days LIKE '%W%'
)

)

WHERE d.DNO IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT m.DNO FROM Member_of m
)
AND d.DNO IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT c.DNO FROM Course c
)
AND d.DNO IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT mi.DNO FROM Minor_in mi
)
AND d.DNO IN (
    SELECT c.DNO FROM Course c
    WHERE c.CName = 'CIRCUITS'
    AND c.Hours = '2'
    AND d.Room = '105'
)
AND d.Room = '105'

records.question: What departments in division AS have a phone number of at least 7119 and are associated with both courses and minors?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dno FROM department
JOIN course ON department.dno = course.dno
JOIN minor_in ON department.dno = minor_in.dno
WHERE department.division = 'AS' AND department.dphone >= 7119
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT d.DNO
FROM Department d
WHERE d.Division = 'AS'
  AND d.DPhone >= 7119
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Course c WHERE c.DNO = d.DNO)
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Minor_in m WHERE m.DNO = d.DNO)

records.question: Which departments have a phone number of at least 7119 and include a student whose name is exactly Andy Schultz?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dno FROM department
JOIN minor_in ON department.dno = minor_in.dno
JOIN student ON minor_in.stuid = student.stuid
WHERE department.dphone >= 7119 AND student.fname = 'Andy' AND student.lname = 'Schultz'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT d.DNO
FROM Department d
WHERE d.DPhone >= 7119
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Student s
    WHERE s.Major = d.DNO
    AND s.Fname = 'Andy'
    AND s.LName = 'Schultz'
)

records.question: What departments have faculty with a primary appointment who teach courses on MT in the Krieger building, have phone number 2032, and whose courses have at most 4 credits?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dno FROM department
JOIN member_of ON department.dno = member_of.dno
JOIN faculty ON member_of.facid = faculty.facid
JOIN course ON faculty.facid = course.instructor
WHERE member_of.appt_type = 'Primary' AND course.days = 'MT' AND faculty.phone = 2032 AND faculty.building = 'Krieger' AND course.credits <= 4
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT d.DNO
FROM Department d
JOIN Member_of m ON d.DNO = m.DNO
JOIN Faculty f ON m.FacID = f.FacID
JOIN Course c ON f.FacID = c.Instructor
WHERE m.Appt_Type = 'primary'
AND c.Days LIKE '%MT%'
AND d.Building = 'Krieger'
AND f.Phone = 2032
AND c.Credits <= 4
